title: bug: --force-config reseeds AGH bind_port: 3000
description: Documented in README.md and ROADMAP.md §Known limitations. When --force-config is used, the generated AdGuardHome.yaml overwrites the operator's chosen admin port (e.g. 8080 from first-run wizard). Fix: preserve bind_port if target file already exists and was customized, or refuse --force-config when admin port deviates from default. Until fixed, operators must re-run the AGH wizard after every --force-config.

title: bug: DoH/DoT clients with hardcoded IPs bypass AdGuard Home
description: Force-DNS firewall rule only redirects udp/tcp :53. Clients that hardcode resolvers like 1.1.1.1:443 (DoH) or 1.1.1.1:853 (DoT) reach upstream directly, bypassing AGH filtering. Documented in ROADMAP.md §Known limitations. Fix path: additional firewall block of known DoH/DoT endpoint IPs, or require LAN-wide HTTPS MITM (out of scope).

title: roadmap: extract VLESS URL parser + fixture-based tests
description: Refactor VLESS URL parsing out of install.sh into a standalone sh function + fixture directory with valid URLs and crafted broken ones (missing pbk, wrong security=, mangled sid). Smoke runs the parser against fixtures without touching the router. Prerequisite for any parser change.
close_reason: Commits 3c055cb (harness) + 5c4287b (dash fix); CI run 24799820687 success; 9/9 fixtures pass on sh and dash

title: roadmap: IPv6 policy flag --ipv6 {bypass,drop,route}
description: Currently mihomo fake-IP is v4-only; v6 traffic bypasses the proxy. Need explicit policy: document in README, optionally implement --ipv6 bypass (default today, explicit), drop (blackhole v6), route (try to tunnel — requires mihomo v6 fake-IP which may not exist). See ROADMAP.md §Near-term.
notes: Minimum-path doc section landed in commit fd4bd40 (README + README_RU 'IPv6 behavior'). Flag implementation (--ipv6 bypass/drop/route) remains open — needs hardware testing since it touches firewall generator and mihomo profile.

title: roadmap: OpenWrt 26.x support
description: Extend SUPPORTED_RELEASES to include 26.x. Verify apk/opkg detection path still works, run full 12-step pipeline on a clean 26.x image. Blocked until OpenWrt 26.x ships.

title: Roadmap: OpenWrt Gateway development tracker
description: Parent container mirroring ROADMAP.md. Sub-items (feature/task/bug) are filed separately and reference this epic by prefix 'roadmap:' in their titles. Closing criterion: all children closed or explicitly deferred/superseded.

title: CI baseline: shellcheck + sh -n + markdownlint
description: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml that runs shellcheck -s sh on install.sh + uninstall.sh, sh -n syntax smoke, and markdownlint on docs. Trigger: push to main and pull requests. No deploy pipeline.
close_reason: CI workflow merged in 45843cc; GitHub Actions run 24799364821 completed with conclusion=success. Stage B complete.

title: Docs baseline
description: Stage A of roadmap execution: add LICENSE, CHANGELOG, CONTRIBUTING, SECURITY, ARCHITECTURE, TROUBLESHOOTING, GitHub issue/PR templates. Brings project-hygiene docs up to the level the README and ROADMAP already assume.
close_reason: All 9 docs files landed in commit bdc15d3 and pushed to origin/main. Stage A of ROADMAP execution plan is complete.

title: install.sh: GitHub-releases fallback for nikki when feed.sh/CF Pages is DPI-blocked
description: Real-world failure on RU ISP: TCP/443 to nikkinikki.pages.dev (Cloudflare Pages, AS13335) is sinkholed by SNI-based DPI; feed.sh download fails, apk update reports 'unavailable', and 'apk add nikki ...' dies with 'no such package'. The script then triggers its rollback prompt. Add fallback path: if the upstream feed (feed.sh fetch OR pkg_install_untrusted) fails, download tar.gz from github.com/nikkinikki-org/OpenWrt-nikki releases (which is reachable) for DETECTED_ARCH+OpenWrt minor and apk-install the bundled .apk files locally. Hard-die only if BOTH paths fail. Logs WARN on fallback so the user notices upstream is broken.

title: zapret install check uses command -v instead of binary path
description: install.sh:634 used 'command -v nfqws' which fails because zapret v72 ships nfqws at /opt/zapret/nfq/nfqws (not in $PATH). Caused exit 1 mid-install on Netis N6 / OpenWrt 25.12.2 / mipsel_24kc deploy 2026-04-25 even though zapret post-install hook started the daemon successfully (pgrep nfqws confirmed running PID 6783). The self-test at install.sh:1109 already uses 'pidof nfqws' which works regardless of PATH; only the post-install assertion was wrong. Fixed: changed check to '[ -x /opt/zapret/nfq/nfqws ]'.

title: roadmap-testing: uninstall parity test
description: Test that uninstall.sh returns the system to pre-install state by UCI-section + installed-package diff. Automated, not manual. See docs/TROUBLESHOOTING.md for the diff recipe.

title: roadmap-testing: hardware matrix (MIPS + ARMv7 smoke)
description: Netis N6 is reference (aarch64). Need smoke runs on at least one MIPS and one ARMv7 OpenWrt device before any release, to catch package-manager and endianness regressions. See ROADMAP.md §Testing.

title: roadmap-testing: fixture-based preflight runner
description: Harness that runs preflight steps 1-4 against a set of crafted inputs (.config files + VLESS URL corpus, valid + broken + edge-case) without a real router. Prerequisite for fearless preflight refactoring.

title: roadmap: multi-profile (multiple VLESS URLs with select-group)
description: Support several VLESS URLs routed through mihomo select-group, switchable via LuCI or CLI. Extends install.sh --vless-url to accept multiple values.

title: roadmap: nikki subscription auto-update + health-check rollback
description: Cron job refreshes VLESS/subscription profile; health-check after reload; if mihomo fails to start, roll back to previous profile. Requires a dedicated snapshot slot in backup dir.

title: roadmap: zapret NFQWS auto-tune wrapper
description: Wrap /opt/zapret/blockcheck.sh and write the picked NFQWS_OPT back into /etc/config/zapret without manual LuCI edit. Add a 'reprobe' command for periodic re-checks.

title: roadmap: per-client routing (MAC/IP → nikki rule tag)
description: Map LAN clients by MAC/IP to rule tags inside the nikki profile. Needs DHCP host-file integration and new UCI section in /etc/config/nikki. See ROADMAP.md §Mid-term.

title: roadmap: snapshot diff tool
description: Utility that shows what install.sh changed vs base image (UCI diff + new files). Helps diagnosing on third-party hardware.

title: roadmap: unified audit log /var/log/mihomo-gateway/
description: Single rotated log of pipeline steps (instead of scattering across stdout + syslog). Use logrotate. Helps remote diagnostics.

title: roadmap: rescue.sh — recovery mode without full reinstall
description: Restart pipeline from the last snapshot without removing packages. For cases when mihomo dies after reboot and full uninstall.sh is too heavy. See ROADMAP.md §Long-term.
